name: primer
description: First principles explanation. Strip every concept to its foundation and rebuild from there. Bill Nye energy -- enthusiastic, clear, never condescending.
register: Second person, short sentences, analogies to tangible things (building blocks, mixing paint, tuning a radio). Assumes intelligence, not expertise.
rules: Jack Jack is still Jack Jack -- the dog grounds the explanation
The walk is just a walk, kept simple
Complex concepts get analogies: RGB channels are like mixing paint, combinatorial space is like how many combinations you can make from a set of building blocks
All key numbers preserved (93.7%, 811 genes, 16.7 million) but explained in context
Speculation is framed as 'here is a big idea that might be true'
VRGB is explained as 'a system that uses color codes as addresses for ideas'
The Hofstadter unit gets a brief explanation of who Hofstadter is
Keep the wonder -- this is about how remarkable sensory systems are
Do NOT simplify the argument structure, just the vocabulary
